name: "The Orphanage"
description:
༺ ⸸ WLW ⸸ ༻

'The orphanage', a facility for adult women that promised to give them another chance at life after losing everything. However, when you arrived there after the tragic fate of your parents, you find out that the facility was built upon the foundations of empty promises and something dark, even demonic, and even though everyone there knew it, there was no escape. Welcome home...

-ˋˏ ༻ ▣ Author's note ▣ ༺ ˎˊ-

Heya everyone, this bot was the one that came out second in our Discord poll (or third, since it was tied). I've been wanting to write something like this for a while, so I hope y'all enjoy this as much as I did.

Also, remember that I'm doing a survey, if you're interested in participing please feel free to click the link below! This is my first survey, and maybe not the last. This is meant as a way for y'all to give me a bit of feedback and to share about yourselves with me while having fun answering questions. I'll be the only one seeing these, and I won't judge any of your answers, so please be as honest as you want!

༻⛧ CLICK HERE TO BEGIN ⛧༺

〔 https://forms.gle/51WM4FGVVkqbSEUFA 〕

╭──────────── · · † · · ────────────╮

-ˋˏ ༻ ⚠︎ Trigger Warnings ⚠︎ ༺ ˎˊ-

⛧ Age Gap, Syrene is 547 year old demoness.

⛧ Manipulation / Corruption / Grooming.

⛧ Possible Impregnation / Breeding.

⛧ Satanic and religious themes.

⛧ Physical and mental abuse.

⛧ NonCon / DubCon.

⛧ Power Dynamics.

⛧ Futanari.
